title: Redstone Witch [Lite]
description: Redstone Witch is a modpack focused on preserving the gameloop of survival Redstone/technical minecraft, while still adding lots of modded content
body:
**Redstone Witch is a modpack focused on preserving the gameloop of survival Redstone/technical minecraft, while still adding a plethora of content like any other modpack.**

**!!! MODPACK REQUIRES JAVA 21 & LATEST FABRIC !!!** vvv

**Modrinth will default the profile to JAVA 17, you will need to manually change it to get the modpack to work**

**!!! MODPACK REQUIRES JAVA 21 & LATEST FABRIC !!!** ^^^

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63fb326355bf5bfb29685db8aee3d679c8cafdfc_0.webp)

Many 'Vanilla+' modpacks out there add too much to the game that usually result in Redstone becoming redundant due to additions like Create or AE2, or seedmaps being unusable due to mods like Terralith. While there is good gameplay to be found within those mods, this modpack aims to be the alternative. 
- **No Quest Book**
- **No Insane World Generation** (seedmaps/cubiomes are mostly usable [wont show modded features])
- **No Crazy Amount of Structures** 
- **Minimal Storage Changes** (nether chests, inmis backpacks, scout)
- **No Durability** - Mending and Unbreaking 3 are no longer a crutch!
- **Keep Some Inventory** - keep tools/weapons/food on death; lose resources on death
- **1.8 Combat** - with Golden Age Combat mod [remove it if you want post-1.9 combat]

Mods have been chosen to only add fluff to the game. No major mechanic changes or shortcuts for farming. Some little mechanic changes are present however, Birch trees can generate with 'branches' so something like Cubicmetre's omnifarm would instead use the Acacia option while farming birch trees, as the branches would break the block stream. !! Not all redstone machines have been tested to work in this modpack, other problems could occur !!

**This modpack adds a couple new redstone blocks**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- supplementaries; lots of stuff (turn table and some things disabled)
  - Relayer (observer-like block that copies the signal it has in front to its back,  1 tick activation)
  - Wind Vane (singal output based on weather)
  - Cog Block (redstone dust as a block)
  - Crystal Display
  - Spring Launcher (only pushes entities, launches twice as far as slime-piston setup)
  - Clock Block (comparator reads the 24hr proportionally to the 0-15 signal strength)
  - Dispenser Minecart
  - Bellows (push air; pushes entities, speeds up furnaces, refreshes fire, speed up copper oxidization)
  - Crank (analog lever, can be turned opposite way with shift click)
  - Hourglass (accepts any sand or dust, can be read by comparator)
- spawn; mucus
- additional additions; copper patina
- you've goat to be kidding me; ram block
- simple copper pipes; copper pipes
- etcetera; dice block, drum
- rubinated nether; ruby laser
- copper and tuff backport; copper bulb

![redstoneblocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/497658dc1b8ccf93cdde516ef31d0ee8f337611f.png)

</details>

**Custom Piglin Rates**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Using the 'Custom Piglin Bartering' mod, I have adjusted the rates for bartering.
The mod also adds trading with gold nuggets and gold blocks.

Nuggets have 'bad drops'

Ingots have all the actual drops you want

Blocks have all the unstackables

Nuggets
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

(not sure nuggets even work idk)
- Water Bottle: drop amount 1, weight 10/80
- Crimson Fungus: drop amount 1-4, weight 35/80
- Warped Fungus: drop amount 1-4, weight 35/80

</details>

Ingots

<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Ender Pearl: drop amount 4-6, weight 20/465
- String: drop amount 5-12, weight 20/465
- Quartz: drop amount 7-13, weight 20/465

</details>

**Extras**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- If you want to use Axiom, 5.3.0 wont crash

This modpack will only be developed for 1.20.1

Why is this a 'Lite' modpack?
- I have some other mods in the back of my mind like _RPG series_ that I would like to include in my modpack, however I also wanted to retain moslty vanilla mechanics. So I decided that there will be this 'Lite" version and a 'Full' version which will be made later once I feel like this is in a great spot.

Known major Bugs
- buggy bed visuals on [let's do meadow] beds
- major instability between Charmforked and other mods; removed charmforked

- promeande 1.19 nether biomes
- basic weapon compat for DragonLoot, Rose Gold (additional additions), etc
- ~~potions last longer overall~~ in most recent sortilege update
- ~~make witches drop more redstone and drowned drop more copper~~ in most recent
- villager trading configs
- ~~custom piglin bartering rates (add magma cream/glowstone dust/shroomlights, increase quartz/obi/cryobi/epearl, lower iron nuggets/spectral arrows)~~ in most recent
- make blocks from This Rocks! breakable by moving blocks [give them pumpkin properties](clearing water in places with seashells causes slimestone to stop)
- trail chambers/breezes
- charm items: redstone sand, copper pistons (pistons w/o quasi connectivity)
